title: matelea albomarginata
intro: Matelea albomarginata, also known as the white-lined swallowtail vine or white-lined matelea, is a type of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Matelea albomarginata include treating various conditions such as fever, sore throats, and skin irritations, as well as being used as a natural remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Matelea albomarginata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of illnesses.
